modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Zoom experiencing significant outage affecting video conferencing.

full_description_text: Users are unable to connect to Zoom meetings. The service is down for video conferencing. Many are reporting issues simultaneously. This is impacting communication and collaboration efforts.
short_description: Zoom experiencing significant outage affecting video conferencing.
description: Users are unable to connect to Zoom meetings. The service is down for video conferencing. Many are reporting issues simultaneously. This is impacting communication and collaboration efforts.
